calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar May-19-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Stephanie Farzam appearing via zoom for James Mayor (petitioner).

The Court stated that this sort of implies that there is a current trustee in place and that for the purpose of judicial economy, it will allow this to go forward. The petition for successor trustee is under submission with the intent to grant. Bond in the amount of $100,000.00 is required.

Judge; Stephen Murphy; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Cristobal; Not reported.

Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-11-2023 Continued To May-16-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition For Suspension Of Powers And Removal Of Catherine Conlin As Co-Trustee Of Trust
Off Calendar May-22-2006 Off Calendar

Petition To Modify Or Terminate Trust
Off Calendar May-22-2006 Off Calendar

Petition To Modify Or Terminate Trust
Off Calendar Apr-24-2006 Continued To May-22-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition For Suspension Of Powers And Removal Of Catherine Conlin As Co-Trustee Of Trust
Off Calendar Apr-24-2006 Continued To May-22-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Michael Heath appearing for petitioner. Nicole Dabbous appearing for Max La Riviere-Hedrick. The court suggested that an expert in artwork be found and to hold off on any sale of art. Mr. Heath addresed the court's recommendation. The parties agreed to no sale of artwork and reimbursement of storage and insurance fees. The matter is continued to 5/22. If the parties agree on a successor trustee, the court will sign an order upon resignation of the current trustee. If unable to agree on a successor trustee, the court will set a hearing on nomination of a new trustee. Commissioner: Dorothy McMath; Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722; Clerk: Alison Agbay
